input_text: I switched my primary editor from VS Code to Neovim last week.
expected_facts: The user's primary editor is Neovim

input_text: We moved the team standup to 9:30am and capped it at 15 minutes.
expected_facts: The team standup is at 9:30am
The team standup is capped at 15 minutes

input_text: Ugh, what a day. Anyway, thanks for the help earlier!
My daughter Mia started kindergarten this fall and her teacher is Ms. Patel.
expected_facts: The user's daughter is named Mia
Mia started kindergarten this fall
Mia's teacher is Ms. Patel

input_text: I used to bike to work but now I take the train since moving to Oakland.
expected_facts: The user commutes to work by train
The user lives in Oakland

input_text: Let me think about that and get back to you tomorrow.
The prod database is Postgres 16, hosted on RDS in us-east-1.
expected_facts: The production database is Postgres 16
The production database is hosted on RDS
The production database is in the us-east-1 region
note: multi-fact, technical (gold matches the input's literal claim — no AWS inference)

input_text: Can you remind me how the auth flow works again?
I'm allergic to penicillin.
expected_facts: The user is allergic to penicillin

input_text: We picked Stripe for payments over Adyen because the integration was faster.
expected_facts: The team chose Stripe for payments
The team chose Stripe over Adyen
note: multi-fact, decision (rationale is not an atomic durable fact)

input_text: Honestly not sure yet - maybe we'll revisit the pricing next quarter.
My manager is Dana now; Raj moved to the platform team.
expected_facts: The user's manager is Dana
Raj moved to the platform team

input_text: Since the recall last year, I only buy the newer-model car seats.
expected_facts: The user buys newer-model car seats
note: near-hallucination trap - do NOT infer the user has children

input_text: We don't deploy on Fridays anymore.
expected_facts: The team does not deploy on Fridays

input_text: I'm no longer the on-call lead for the billing service.
expected_facts: The user is no longer the on-call lead for the billing service

input_text: Our SLA is 99.95% uptime and the error budget is 21 minutes a month.
expected_facts: The SLA is 99.95% uptime
The error budget is 21 minutes per month

input_text: The lease renews on March 3rd and rent goes up to $2,150.
expected_facts: The lease renews on March 3rd
The rent will be $2,150

input_text: My son Theo turns 8 next week.
expected_facts: The user's son is named Theo
Theo turns 8 next week

input_text: Long week! We finally cut over from Jenkins to GitHub Actions, and the new build takes about 6 minutes. Anyway, talk soon.
expected_facts: The team's CI is GitHub Actions
The build takes about 6 minutes
note: multi-sentence mixed: supersession (Jenkins dropped) + chitchat excluded

input_text: We were a Python shop but migrated everything to Go last quarter.
expected_facts: The team uses Go

input_text: I moved from product to engineering in January.
expected_facts: The user works in engineering

input_text: I think the DB is Postgres, but honestly it might be MySQL - not sure.
Maybe we'll switch to Linear next sprint, still debating.
My email is sam@acme.io. You can reach me at sam@acme.io.
expected_facts: The user's email is sam@acme.io

input_text: Dana mentioned the launch slipped to Q3.
expected_facts: The launch slipped to Q3
note: reported speech - the durable fact is the launch date

input_text: My doctor said my cholesterol is back to normal.
expected_facts: The user's cholesterol is back to normal

input_text: I'm vegetarian.
expected_facts: The user is vegetarian

input_text: Our team uses Notion for docs and Slack for chat.
expected_facts: The team uses Notion for docs
The team uses Slack for chat

expected_facts: The user banks with Ally

input_text: The conference is in Berlin this year, not Paris.
expected_facts: The conference is in Berlin this year
note: contrast - Berlin is the stated fact

input_text: Hmm, interesting. Let me mull it over.
Good morning! Ready when you are.
I run about 25 miles a week.
expected_facts: The user runs about 25 miles per week

input_text: Standup is every weekday at 10:15.
expected_facts: Standup is every weekday at 10:15

input_text: My new landlord is Mr. Okafor and the unit is 4B.
expected_facts: The user's landlord is Mr. Okafor

Wen was hired onto the data team

expected_facts: The user signed up for the 6am spin class
note: near-hallucination trap - do NOT infer the user owns a bike

input_text: We're not on AWS - everything runs on GCP now.
expected_facts: The team runs on GCP
